name: get_orders
description: Query orders with various filters including customer ID, order status, shipping status, and return status. Returns detailed order information including product names, dates, and current status.

order_status.description: Filter by order status (pending, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled)

shipping_status.description: Filter by shipping status (not shipped, in transit, delivered)

return_status.description: Filter by return/exchange status (not returned, returned, exchanged)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 50, max 100)

name: get_orders_summary
description: Get a summary of all orders grouped by status. Shows total count of orders in each status (pending, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled).
